productDisplayName: Reebok Unisex Adventure Sports Grey Sandals
description: Float in comfort with the Drive range of floaters from reebok. Comfortable yet sturdy, these sandals are great for a stroll in the park or a walk on a trek trail. Upper Synthetic upper for maximum style Upper with forefoot and ankle straps, coupled with velcro fasteners providing a snug, customized Fit Embossed logo on the ankle strap for style Midsole Textured footbed for soft, massage feel and all-day comfort Outsole TPR outsole with multi-directional pattern for greater traction Flex grooves for natural movement of the feet Lugs to provide greater durability shoe care Do not machine wash Remove dust and dirt with damp clean cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
